_README: Human-curated bridge between microcrypt-zoo node/citation names and cryptology.city slugs. The sync script NEVER creates a page for a node whose status is "unmapped" — it only reports it — so this file is the dedup boundary. Set node.status to "mapped" (point slug at an EXISTING content page), "new" (let the bot create a stub), or "ignore" (out of scope). For citations set the city key, ref_slug (content/References/<ref_slug>.md), cryptobib_key when known, and ref_exists:true once the reference page is in the repo.

⊥-PRF.intro_seed: ⊥-PRF (a quantum PRF with a recognizable abort)

⊥-PRG.intro_seed: ⊥-PRG (a quantum PRG with a recognizable abort)

1PRS.intro_seed: Single-copy PRS, with m>(1+epsilon)n, for some fixed epsilon, for key-length n and output size m.

CCA1-EO-qPKE.intro_seed: Reusable CCA1 Encryption Scheme with Quantum Public-Keys and Classical Ciphers

CCA1-qPKE with quantum ciphers.intro_seed: Non-reusable CCA1 Encryption Scheme with Quantum Public-Keys and Quantum Ciphers

CCA2 Sym. Encryption w. Classical Cipher.intro_seed: CCA2 Symmetric Encryption with Classical Ciphers

EFI.intro_seed: Efficiently samplable, statistically Far but computationally Indistinguishable pairs of mixed quantum states

Imperfect MAC.intro_seed: Imperfect CMA MAC with Classical Tags

Long Input PRFS.intro_seed: Long Input Pseudorandom Function-like States. The input size needs to be omega(log(n)) qubits.

MAC.intro_seed: Length Restricted CMA MAC with Classical Tags

MAC with Quantum Tags.intro_seed: Reusable (Non-CMA) Length Restricted MAC with Quantum Tags

NA-CPA Sym. Encryption w. Classical Ciph.intro_seed: Non-adaptive CPA Symmetric Encryption with Classical Ciphers

negl-QPRG.intro_seed: Quantum Pseudorandom Generator with negligible error

NI-SB-QCOM.intro_seed: Non-Interactive Computationally Hiding Statistically Binding Quantum Bit Commitments

NI-SH-QCOM.intro_seed: Non-Interactive Statistically Hiding Computationally Binding Quantum Bit Commitments

nu1PRS.intro_seed: Non-Uniform single-copy PRS, with m>n, for key-length n and output size m

nuQEFID.intro_seed: Non-Uniform Quantum Efficiently samplable, statistically Far but computationally Indistinguishable Distributions

OTS.intro_seed: One-time Signature with a Classical Public-Key

OTS with Quantum Public Keys.intro_seed: One-time Signatures with Quantum Public Keys

PRFSPD.intro_seed: Long Input Pseudorandom Function-like States with Proofs of Destruction

PRS.intro_seed: Pseudorandom States with superlogarithmic outputs size

PRSNPD.intro_seed: Pseudorandom States with Nice Proofs of Destruction

PRSPD.intro_seed: Pseudorandom States with Proofs of Destruction

QEFID.intro_seed: Quantum Efficiently samplable, statistically Far but computationally Indistinguishable Distributions

QMPC.intro_seed: Quantum MPC for P/poly with Dishonest Majority

QSKE.intro_seed: Selective CPA Symmetric Encryption with Quantum Ciphers

SB-COM.intro_seed: Statistically Binding Computationally Hiding Bit Commitments with Classical Communication

SB-QCOM.intro_seed: Computationally Hiding Statistically Binding Quantum Bit Commitments

Short Input PRFS.intro_seed: Short Input Pseudorandom Function-like States with selective security. The input size needs to be Theta(log(n)) qubits.

Short Output PRFS.intro_seed: Short Output Pseudorandom Function-Like States. The output state needs to have Theta(log(n)) qubits.

Short Output PRS.intro_seed: Short Output Pseudorandom States. The output state needs to have c*log(n) qubits for some large enough c.

SIG.intro_seed: Chosen Plaintext Attack Secure Digital Signature with imperfect completeness

Tamper Proof QPKE.intro_seed: Tamper Proof CPA PKE with quantum public keys and classical ciphers
